evals.prompt: We built a factory that must be restored in 10 years at an estimated cost of $1M. Our credit-adjusted risk-free rate is 5%. How do we record this today?
evals.expected_output: Should calculate the Present Value of the $1M ($1M / (1.05)^10 = ~$613.9k). Should describe the entry to Debit Asset / Credit ARO Liability. Should mention subsequent Accretion and Depreciation. Should provide an ARO Schedule.
assertions: Calculates PV of $1M at 5% over 10 years (~$613,913)
Mentions Debit Asset / Credit Liability journal entry
Identifies Accretion as the unwinding of the discount
Explains that the capitalized cost is depreciated over the asset life
Output follows ARO Schedule structure

evals.prompt: Recognize an ARO: well P&A cost estimated at 2.5M (today's cost) in 12 years, cost inflation 4%, discount rate 11%. Then show year-1 accretion and depreciation (UoP basis unavailable - use straight line).
evals.expected_output: Future cost = 2.5M x 1.04^12 = ~4.0M; PV = 4.0/1.11^12 = ~1.15M. Capitalize into the asset and recognize the provision. Year-1 accretion = 1.15M x 11% = ~126k finance cost; depreciation = 1.15M/12 = ~96k.
assertions: Inflates then discounts to ~1.15M initial provision
Capitalizes the same amount into the related asset
Computes year-1 accretion of ~126k
Depreciates the ARO asset over the 12-year life
Calculates with code

evals.prompt: Three years into a 10-year ARO, regulators tighten standards and the cost estimate rises 40%; discount rates also fell from 11% to 9%. Account for the change.
evals.expected_output: IFRIC 1: recompute the provision at the revised estimate AND current 9% rate over the remaining 7 years; the increase adjusts both provision and asset (cost model), with prospective depreciation over the remaining life. No restatement of past accretion.
assertions: Remeasures with both the new cost and the new rate
Adjusts the asset and provision symmetrically
Applies the change prospectively including revised depreciation
Notes US GAAP layering difference for upward revisions

evals.prompt: Using the attached asset retirement obligations file (evals/files/retirement_obligations.csv), measure the initial ARO liability for each asset (inflate current cost to retirement date, discount back at the credit-adjusted rate), total the provision, and compute year-1 accretion expense.
assertions: Platform Alpha ARO approx $5,893,636
Platform Beta ARO approx $4,979,947
Storage site Gamma ARO approx $1,270,349
Total provision approx $12,143,931
Year-1 accretion approx $958,811
Computes with code
